questions.question: A planning combination of educational, political, regulatory and organizational support for action conditions of living conducive to health of individuals, groups or community
Health promotion it's.....
options: Process of enabling people to increase control over and improve their health
Process which empowers families and communities to improve quality of life
Emphasize not only prevention of disease but the promotion of positive good health

questions.question: Goal of health promotion...
options: Raise the level of health of an individual, families and community
Enable person to control over their wellbeing
